description_long: This object consists of two long, parallel steel rails mounted on a series of evenly spaced, rectangular wooden sleepers. The rails are dark gray, smooth, and straight, running the full length of the structure, while the sleepers are a natural brown color and provide support and spacing for the rails. The construction is robust and industrial, typical of railway infrastructure found in urban environments. There is no visible ballast bed or pavement embedding; the sleepers are fully exposed beneath the rails. The object is compact, representing a short segment of standard railway track, and lacks any additional features such as signage or crossing gates. The materials and design suggest it is intended to support the weight and movement of trains or rail vehicles.
description: A short segment of railway track with two parallel steel rails mounted on brown wooden sleepers, robust and industrial in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the parallel steel rails and the full width of the wooden sleepers beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the rails and the evenly spaced sleepers, with both rails visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the parallel rails and wooden sleepers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the rails and sleepers from the other side.
